caption: A man with glasses and a tall, grey, spiked wig is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white long-sleeved button-down shirt, a small red bowtie, and light-colored suspenders. He wears black over-ear headphones and sits behind a professional black microphone. The background features a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and a white hanging organizer. On-screen graphics appear on both sides of the man, featuring a logo and the text "BOSS TALK 101" with "PODCAST" written beneath a microphone icon on the left side. Across the sequence, the man remains in a stationary seated position, slightly shifting his head and facial expressions as he appears to be speaking. The lighting and background remain consistent, while the man's mouth opens and closes in a conversational manner.
